message:
✨ Add flash animation when metric values change

- New useFlashOnChange hook to detect value changes
- New FlashingValue component for animated number display
- Green flash animation draws attention to updates
- Applied to all cluster card layouts (grid, list, compact)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

- {hasCachedData && cluster.nodeCount !== undefined ? cluster.nodeCount : '-'} +

CPUs
- {hasCachedData && cluster.podCount !== undefined ? cluster.podCount : '-'} +

@@ -316,28 +317,32 @@ const ListClusterCard = memo(function ListClusterCard({

- - {hasCachedData ? cluster.podCount : '-'} - +
{gpuInfo && gpuInfo.total > 0 && (
- - {gpuInfo.total} - +
)}
@@ -431,25 +436,25 @@ const CompactClusterCard = memo(function CompactClusterCard({
- {hasCachedData ? cluster.nodeCount : '-'} +
Nodes
- {hasCachedData ? cluster.cpuCores : '-'} +
CPUs

Pods

GPUs

@@ -0,0 +1,28 @@ +import { memo } from 'react' +import { useFlashOnChange } from '../../hooks/useFlashOnChange' + +interface FlashingValueProps { + value: number | string | undefined + className?: string + flashDuration?: number +} + +/** + * Component that displays a value and flashes when it changes. + * The flash is a brief highlight animation to draw attention to updates. + */ +export const FlashingValue = memo(function FlashingValue({ + value, + className = '', + flashDuration = 1500, +}: FlashingValueProps) { + const isFlashing = useFlashOnChange(value, flashDuration) + + return ( + + {value} + + ) +})
